title: Integrate stdlib artifact manifest across superrepo

source.subject: feat: standard library artifact manifest and UI consolidation

body:
Integrates stdlib **artifact manifest** handling across superrepo repos (compiler, pckg, site coordination).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c52da28`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c52da28)
- **Subject:** feat: standard library artifact manifest and UI consolidation
- **Completed:** 2026-03-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Superrepo orchestration for **pckg-stdlib-manifest-ui**.
